title: leontopodium coreanum
intro: Leontopodium coreanum, commonly known as Korean mountain mint or edelweiss, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Korea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Leontopodium coreanum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
